pi_items.source: task.json prompt instructions and verifier.py visual check confirm this is the synthetic tenant name to enter.
task.json prompt instructions and verifier.py visual check confirm this is the synthetic client ID to enter (patterned UUID).
task.json prompt instructions confirm this is the synthetic client secret to enter.
install_adaudit_plus.ps1 script sets expectedInstallDir to this path.
verifier.py expects the programmatic evidence file at this path, although the post_task script to generate it is missing.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring ADAudit Plus with a synthetic Azure AD tenant named 'northwindtraders.onmicrosoft.com', client ID 'd87c3e2a-4f5b-6c7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f', and client secret 'N7~3_X9.V-P2~kM5~jR8_wL4.qT1~sZ6'. The software is installed at 'C:\Program Files\ManageEngine\ADAudit Plus'. The programmatic evidence file is expected at 'C:\Users\Public\task_result.json', though the script to generate it is missing.
